The [Status] feature is now available. You can set tags such as [In Combat], [Do Not Disturb], and [Taking a break] as your status via the [+] button in chat. Once set, the status will appear on [My Profile] and in private chats with other Commanders.

title: Sky: Children of the Light
notes:
Art You Can Walk Through
Explore beautiful, playable environments made from Van Gogh's best known paintings, from sunlit fields in the Netherlands to the glowing night skies that only he could imagine. Each and every landscape is a work of art in motion, rendered in his bold, expressive brushstroke style and alive with the emotion he poured into every canvas.

For details: http://bit.ly/sky-patchnotes

Follow us for news:
- Discord/Facebook/X/Instagram/TikTok: @thatskygame
- YouTube/Twitch: @tha

An unknown experiment, a valley shrouded in fog. Enemies and "friends," a bizarre liminality. In the heavy fog, you faintly hear something that sounds like... "Hello"...
A series of mysterious and bizarre phenomena have appeared in the Valley. Your job is to explore and uncover what's causing these eerie events!
Sanity
Your Sanity will decrease in certain areas and slowly recover outside of them.
As your Sanity drops, your vision and stamina will be affected.

Endless Tower has arrived.
Three new class-specific Endless Tower events, arenas, and ranking seasons have been added.
Clan Ranking is now available from the existing Player Ranking page with a Clan tab and server-group clan power leaderboard.
Dice and Fishing events are now connected to event-specific rankings, with ranking previews and reward structures shown on the event pages.

title: Wuthering Waves - To Xuanfang
notes: Fixed some known crashes.

title: Where Winds Meet
notes: A massive map region in the center of Kaifeng is open. Explore the secrets and stories within the Imperial Palace, and experience the new campaign!

title: Zombie Waves-shooting game
notes:
1. New Rocket Launcher: Blazing Summer
2. New Hellfire Skin: Blazing Wings
3. New Decoration Series: Peculiar Architecture Series

title: Eternal Sword Pact
notes:
1.Visual & Engine Optimizations: Further optimized character textures and environment rendering for a smoother visual experience. 
2.UI Polish: Refined the visual presentation of selected in-game menus and item icons. 
3.Performance Enhancements: Addressed minor graphical glitches and improved overall client stability.

◆ War of the Hunt

title: Mystery Town: Merge Games
notes: More exciting events will be launched one after another, stay tuned！

title: Glow Fashion Idol
notes:
We’re thrilled to unveil the newest update for Glow! Here’s what’s new:
Step into a sweet world of style with the Candyland event, Zodiac-inspired looks, dazzling mazes, and exciting fashion challenges!
Explore fresh collections, exclusive VIP offers, and special Birthstone rewards.
Compete in events and elevate your fashion journey!
And as usual, more improvements & enhancements.
